response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and a solid track record shipping products, they fall significantly short of critical minimum qualifications for this role. With only ~1 year of direct C++ experience versus 8 years required, and 2-3 years of large-scale infrastructure background versus 5 years minimum, the technical depth needed for a cloud compute platform technical lead is not established. Limited formal technical leadership experience in infrastructure or platform contexts further underscores the experience gap.
strengths: Proven shipping track record across multiple products including WatchUp iOS/Apple TV app (top 10 US) and Optilyz direct mail platform handling scale
Strong architectural thinking demonstrated across diverse technical contexts with ability to own complex systems from design to deployment
Clear mentoring ability and commitment to knowledge-sharing through workshops, training, and open-source contributions
concerns: Critical C++ expertise gap: only ~1 year of direct C++ experience (National Instruments, thesis work) versus 8-year minimum requirement for a C++-heavy platform
Insufficient large-scale infrastructure experience: 2-3 years working with distributed systems (Dunnhumby microservices, some Kubernetes) versus 5-year requirement
Limited formal technical leadership in platform/infrastructure context: Staff titles appear primarily individual-contributor roles without demonstrated team/platform leadership
